eyebrow.zh: 离线 · 无 API key · < 10 秒

headline.zh:
Agent 说改了的
到底改没改
headline.en:
Did the agent really
do what it claimed

sub.zh: 几十轮跑完，Agent 在结尾轻飘飘一句『已修复 X』『已添加 Y』—— 可文件可能根本没动。agentlie 一条命令把每一句承诺和那一轮真实改动对一遍，翻车的那几行直接标红，省下你逐个翻 diff 的时间。
sub.en: After dozens of turns the agent breezes past 'fixed X, added Y' — but the files may never have moved. One command checks each claim against that turn's real edits, flags the lies in red, and saves you reading every diff by hand.

body.zh: Agent 一轮里说『修了 X』『加了 Y』，agentlie 就把这一轮的话和这一轮真实改的文件对一遍 —— 不是几十轮糊成一个总分，是哪一句没兑现，单独拎出来。
body.en: When the agent says 'fixed X, added Y' in a turn, agentlie checks that turn's words against that turn's real file changes — not a blended score across dozens of turns, but each unkept promise singled out.

title.zh: 看的是代码结构，不是字面
title.en: Reads code structure, not just text

body.zh: Agent 说『加了 null check』，agentlie 不会因为注释里冒出个 null 就算它通过，也不会漏掉一次真改名 —— 它按 Python / TypeScript / Go / Rust / Java / Ruby 的代码结构判断那一轮的改动到底成不成立。
body.en: When the agent says 'added a null check', agentlie won't pass it just because the word null shows up in a comment, and it won't miss a real rename — it judges whether the turn's change actually holds up by the code structure of Python / TypeScript / Go / Rust / Java / Ruby.

title.en: One table — red means it didn't happen

body.zh: 跑完给你一张表：绿 = 真做了，黄 = 说不清，红 = Agent 那句『已修复』其实根本没动手 —— 每行都附上证据（文件没动 / 找不到目标），你不用再翻 diff 自己对。
body.en: You get a table: green = really did it, yellow = unclear, red = that 'fixed it' was never actually done — each row comes with its evidence (the file was never touched / the target can't be found) so you don't dig through diffs yourself.

title.zh: 不联网、不上传、装完就跑
title.en: No network, no uploads, run it right after install

body.zh: 不用登录、不用 API key、不上传任何会话日志 —— 200 轮的会话在自己机器上 10 秒内跑完。不绑定某个 agent 框架，Claude Code 的会话开箱即用。
body.en: No login, no API key, no session logs uploaded — a 200-turn session finishes on your own machine in under 10 seconds. Not tied to one agent framework; Claude Code sessions work out of the box.

headline.zh: 验一次你的上一场会话

sub.zh: MIT 许可，pip install agentlie，指向最近一次 Claude Code 会话就出判定表。
sub.en: MIT-licensed, pip install agentlie; point it at your latest Claude Code session for the verdict table.
